instructions.text: Use Ceeline for internal agent reasoning, instruction compilation, handoffs, and reports. Use clear verbose prose only for the final response to the user.

facts: Internal agent reasoning should stay in Ceeline.
Final user responses should be clear prose.
payload.ask: Apply the boundary consistently during prompt assembly.

final_response.text: Summarize the approved boundary for the user in plain language.

payload.summary: Ceeline will be used for internal agent communication, compiled instructions, and intermediate reports.
facts: Readable instructions can stay readable at rest.
Only the final response to the user is rendered in full prose.
